text: There is not enough padding at the top of the markdown in the planning details sidebar. The top (and bottom) padding should be the same as the side padding.

proposedTasks.title: Fix markdown padding in planning details sidebar
proposedTasks.description: Adjust the top and bottom padding of the markdown content area in the planning details sidebar to match the existing left/right (side) padding. Acceptance criteria: (1) Top padding of the rendered markdown block equals the side padding. (2) Bottom padding of the rendered markdown block equals the side padding. (3) Side padding remains unchanged.

taskTitles: Fix markdown padding in planning details sidebar
